nasb.text: Her neighbors and her relatives heard that the Lord had displayed His great mercy toward her; and they were rejoicing with her.

esv.text: And her neighbors and relatives heard that the Lord had shown great mercy to her, and they rejoiced with her.

cnv.text: 鄰里親戚，聽見主向她大施憐憫，都和她一同歡樂。

ccb.text: 亲戚和邻居听见主向她大施怜悯，都和她一同欢乐。

csbs.text: 她的邻居和亲戚听说主向她大施怜悯，就与她一同欢乐。
